transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Yeah, I'm doing great.

Hey, Curtis.

I don't know how.
And seasons?
No.

Real quick.

And so it's been an exciting launch and journey so far post-launch.
Very cool.
Yeah.
I'll go for it, Kyle.
No, nothing useful.

That's a, that's a cool approach to, to the problem.
Yeah.
Yeah.
saw your LinkedIn post and just connecting it to like things we experience every day, you know, emails from the CEO and things of that nature.

Of last year, I was also the first customer.

Oh, that's really exciting.

Maybe that's Lightbox, maybe that's something different.
Yeah, I'll pass it over to you.
Yeah, so I think, I think what originally happened was, we

With Lightbox, we chose another vendor, so we didn't necessarily need the reference call, but decided to keep this on the calendar just to have a connect point.

Thank

In like a GEO world where there's such a long tail of ways people can interact with a chat GPT and so many opportunities to start selling your service before someone even hits your website.
Any questions at a high level around our model or where we're fitting in?
No, that sounds really interesting.
Cool.
To support our delivery and execution, we've got an internal platform where the AI workflows live.

So every client gets a

We've got a team.

We've got.
